creator: uqs@FreeBSD.org
text:
This moves the roff papers, PSD, SMM, and USD into the doc repository. Running
a build will produce typeset documents in ASCII format. To get Postscript, you need
to make PRINTERDEVICE=ps, this is due to the default in bsd.doc.mk

Fix: 

Patch is at http://people.freebsd.org/~uqs/roff_papers.diff
